description: A composite of three photographs. On the left is a frontal booking-style portrait of a young adult man with dark curly hair against a height-chart background marked with numbers from about 56 to 70. On the right is a lower-quality portrait of a second young adult man in a light collared shirt. Centered between them is a smaller inset portrait of a young woman wearing a green knit beanie. The image carries no overlaid text or seal.
